comment: Physics curriculum manifest. Hand-authored seed lessons + Project Gutenberg references (metadata-only). Companion to data/math_corpus/ for the symbolic-reasoning register; this seeds Athena's physical-intuition register, ranging from Newtonian mechanics through electromagnetism, thermodynamics, relativity, and an introduction to quantum behavior.

registers.mechanics_intro: motion, force, mass, acceleration; Newton's laws and gravity; Stage 2
registers.energy_work: kinetic and potential energy, work, conservation laws; Stage 2
registers.waves_sound_light: wavelength, frequency, refraction, sound, electromagnetic spectrum; Stage 2-3
registers.electricity_magnetism: charge, current, electric and magnetic fields, induction; Stage 3
registers.thermo_kinetic: temperature, heat, gas laws, entropy, kinetic theory; Stage 3
registers.relativity_intro: frames of reference, invariance of c, time dilation, mass-energy; Stage 3
registers.quantum_intro: discreteness, photons, wave-particle duality, uncertainty; Stage 3

works.title: Charge, current, and the electromagnetic field
Fields and the way forces reach across space
Heat, temperature, and the laws of thermodynamics
Conservation laws and why they matter
Frames of reference and Einstein's relativity
Quanta, photons, and the strangeness of the very small
Six Lectures on Light
works.author: John Tyndall
works.comment: Metadata-only reference; no local file. The loader skips empty file lists. Reserved for a future fetch pass that respects Gutenberg ToS.
